entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: An important legume crop, also known as groundnut or Arachis hypogaea

entities.description: DNA sequences generated from groundnut as part of a microsatellite marker development project

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MOTIFS
entities.description: Repetitive DNA sequences found within the analyzed genomic sequences

entities.name: CLUSTERING
entities.description: A process used to group sequences for similarity analysis

entities.name: BLAST
entities.description: A sequence alignment tool used to find similarities between genomic sequences and publicly available databases

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA
entities.description: A model plant used for sequence similarity comparison

entities.name: LOTUS JAPONICUS
entities.description: A legume plant showing high sequence similarity and similar codon usage patterns to peanut

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop used for sequence similarity comparison

entities.name: MEDICAGO TRUNCATULA
entities.description: A legume plant used for sequence similarity comparison

entities.name: CODON USAGE PATTERN
entities.description: The frequency of use of different codons for the same amino acid in a species

entities.name: TAXONOMY
entities.description: The science of naming, describing, and classifying organisms

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the relationship of genome structure and function across different species
